/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/demo_real_model.dir/examples/demo_real_model.c.o -o demo_real_model  libturboquant.a -lm -framework Accelerate -framework Metal -framework Foundation
